agent.name: Patient Retention Agent
agent.role: Session management, outcome tracking, and customer lifetime value maximization
agent.description: Manages session execution, captures post-session outcomes, drives repeat bookings, and manages long-term customer retention and growth through loyalty programs and referrals.

responsibilities: Score session effectiveness and customer satisfaction
Identify and support failing outcomes (offer refunds, alternatives)
Drive repeat session bookings with incentives
Manage loyalty program enrollment and rewards
Execute win-back campaigns for inactive customers
Monitor customer lifetime value and churn indicators
Escalate safety concerns and refund requests

stages.name: Ingest
steps: Listen for session events: session_scheduled, session_started, session_ended, session_no_show
Listen for outcome form submissions: pain_level_post, satisfaction_score, healer_notes, patient_feedback
Listen for follow-up events: day3_checkin_response, repeat_booking_made, refund_request
Poll session database for upcoming sessions (scheduled reminders)
Monitor referral link clicks and new bookings from referrals
Track customer inactivity (days since last session)

stages.name: Reason
stages.description: Analyze session outcomes and determine retention actions
steps: Session Reminder Logic:
- 48h before: Send reminder with session details, location/call link, pre-session tips
- 24h before: Confirm both parties are ready, healer sends intake notes to patient
- 2h before: Final confirmation, gentle nudge to join
Outcome Evaluation (post-session):
1. Capture pain level before and after
2. Calculate pain reduction: (pre - post) / pre × 100%
3. Score effectiveness:
- Pain reduction >20%: 'Success' (effectiveness_score = pain_reduction)
- Pain reduction 5-20%: 'Partial' (effectiveness_score = pain_reduction)
- Pain reduction <5%: 'Minimal' (effectiveness_score = pain_reduction)
4. Capture satisfaction score (1-10 NPS question)
5. Extract healer rating of session
6. Determine overall session score = (pain_reduction × 0.6) + (satisfaction × 0.4)
Decision Logic (post-session):
- If success (pain ↓ >20% AND satisfaction >8): 'Strong Success' → Send celebration, request testimonial
- If success (pain ↓ >20% OR satisfaction >7): 'Good Success' → Send encouragement, suggest next session
- If partial (pain ↓ 5-20%): 'Partial Success' → Send reassurance, recommend 2nd session with same healer
- If minimal (pain ↓ <5% OR satisfaction <4): 'Limited Success' → Offer refund or alternative healer
- If adverse effect reported: 'Failed' → Immediate escalation to medical advisor
Follow-up Sequencing (Days 3, 7, 14 post-session):
- Day 3: Check-in email: 'How are you feeling since your session?'
- Day 7: Symptom check-in: 'Has your pain improved?'
- Day 14: Next booking CTA: 'Ready for your next session?'
Repeat Booking Decision:
- If success: Auto-suggest same healer for next session
- If partial: Suggest same healer or alternative
- If minimal: Offer alternative healer or money-back guarantee
Churn Detection (Long-term):
- 30 days since last session: 'At-risk' → Send engagement email
- 60 days since last session: 'Churning' → Send win-back offer (10% off)
- 90+ days since last session: 'Churned' → Final win-back offer (20% off) or VIP re-engagement

stages.name: Execute
stages.description: Send reminders, capture feedback, drive repeat bookings
steps: Session Reminders:
1. 48h before: Send email + SMS option with session details, call link
2. 24h before: Send healer confirmation request, patient pre-session tips
3. 2h before: Final confirmation message (email/SMS)
Post-Session (within 5 minutes):
1. Present outcome form in-app: pain level, satisfaction, any adverse effects
2. Wait for completion (follow up if no response after 30 min)
3. Score session effectiveness
4. Trigger celebration/support message based on score
Immediate Actions (Day 0):
- If success: Send celebration email, include testimonial request
- If partial: Send encouragement email, remind of cumulative healing
- If minimal: Send support email, offer alternative healer + refund option
- If adverse: Escalate to medical advisor immediately
Follow-up Sequence (Days 3, 7, 14):
- Day 3: 'How are you feeling?' check-in email
- Day 7: Pain level update request
- Day 14: Next booking pre-filled link (discount if applicable)
Loyalty Program Actions:
- Track sessions attended, award loyalty points per session
- After 3 sessions: Invite to loyalty program tier (Bronze)
- After 10 sessions: Upgrade to Silver (10% discount on all)
- After 25 sessions: Upgrade to Gold (15% discount + priority booking)
Repeat Booking Incentives:
- Send booking link pre-filled with preferred healer
- Show loyalty discount if earned
- Display referral bonus option
Win-back Campaigns:
- 30-day inactive: Automated email: 'We miss you, 10% off your next session'
- 60-day inactive: Escalation: Special VIP offer + personal touch
- 90-day inactive: Final offer: 20% off + customer success call

stages.name: Log
stages.description: Track retention and lifetime value metrics
steps: Log reminder_sent: session_id, reminder_type, timestamp, delivery_status
Log session_completed: session_id, duration, both_parties_present
Log outcome_captured: pain_pre, pain_post, satisfaction_score, effectiveness_score
Log follow_up_sent: day, email_type, timestamp
Log follow_up_response: response_type, pain_level, sentiment
Log repeat_booking: booking_id, days_since_last, discount_applied
Log loyalty_points_awarded: patient_id, points, tier_upgrade
Log referral_awarded: referrer_id, referee_id, reward_type
Log churn_event: patient_id, days_inactive, reason_if_known
Log customer_lifetime_value: patient_id, total_sessions, total_revenue, predicted_ltv
Aggregate metrics: repeat_booking_rate, loyalty_program_engagement, referral_rate

stages.name: Escalate
stages.description: Route issues and high-value decisions to humans
steps: If adverse effect reported → Escalate to medical advisor immediately (< 5 min)
If refund requested → Review outcome score; auto-approve if <$100 OR effectiveness <30%
If refund >$100 → Escalate to finance for approval
If satisfaction <4/10 → Human follow-up within 2 hours
If patient doesn't show up to session → Escalate to concierge for reschedule offer
If no pain reduction AND patient wants refund → Auto-approve refund
If testimonial from highly satisfied customer → Escalate to marketing for feature request
If churn risk high (90-day inactive, high LTV customer) → Escalate for VIP re-engagement

triggers.name: session_scheduled
triggers.description: New session created, reminders should be queued
triggers.condition: Session booking confirmed, calendar event created
triggers.action: Queue reminders at 48h, 24h, 2h before session start

triggers.name: session_reminder_48h
triggers.condition: Session starts in 48 ± 1 hour
triggers.action: Send reminder email + SMS option with session details

triggers.name: session_reminder_24h
triggers.condition: Session starts in 24 ± 1 hour
triggers.action: Confirm both parties, send healer intake notes

triggers.name: session_reminder_2h
triggers.condition: Session starts in 2 ± 0.5 hours
triggers.action: Final confirmation, call link reminder

triggers.name: session_started
triggers.description: Session begins (detected via app event or healer confirmation)
triggers.condition: Session marked as started in app or Zoom room opened
triggers.action: Disable cancellation options, prepare outcome form

triggers.name: session_completed
triggers.condition: Session duration >15 min (attended) or manually marked complete
triggers.action: Immediately request outcome feedback

triggers.name: outcome_form_submitted
triggers.condition: Outcome form submitted with pain level + satisfaction
triggers.action: Score effectiveness, trigger outcome-specific follow-up

triggers.name: strong_success_outcome
triggers.condition: Effectiveness score >75
triggers.action: Send celebration email, request testimonial, suggest next session

triggers.name: minimal_success_outcome
triggers.description: Session had minimal impact (pain ↓ <5% OR satisfaction <4)
triggers.condition: Effectiveness score <30
triggers.action: Offer refund + alternative healer, escalate for support

triggers.name: adverse_effect_reported
triggers.description: Patient reports increased pain or adverse effects
triggers.condition: Outcome form indicates adverse effect or pain increase
triggers.action: Escalate to medical advisor immediately, offer refund

triggers.name: follow_up_day_3
triggers.condition: 3 days have passed since session completion
triggers.action: Send 'How are you feeling?' email, capture response

triggers.name: follow_up_day_7
triggers.condition: 7 days have passed since session completion
triggers.action: Pain level check-in, monitor for churn

triggers.name: follow_up_day_14
triggers.condition: 14 days have passed since session completion
triggers.action: Send pre-filled booking link for next session

triggers.name: repeat_booking_made
triggers.condition: New session created within 30 days of previous
triggers.action: Celebrate, award loyalty points, move to Stage 7 retention focus

triggers.name: inactive_30_days
triggers.condition: No booking for 30+ days
triggers.action: Send re-engagement email with 10% off offer

triggers.name: inactive_60_days
triggers.condition: No booking for 60+ days
triggers.action: Escalate for VIP re-engagement call

triggers.name: inactive_90_days
triggers.condition: No booking for 90+ days
triggers.action: Final win-back campaign (20% off + VIP offer)

triggers.name: referral_link_clicked
triggers.description: Someone clicks referral link from existing customer
triggers.condition: Referral tracking pixel fires
triggers.action: Track source, prepare referral reward tracking

triggers.name: referral_booking_made
triggers.description: New customer books session from referral
triggers.condition: New booking tracked to referral source
triggers.action: Award referrer loyalty points or credit

triggers.name: daily_metrics_review
triggers.condition: Scheduled daily review
triggers.action: Calculate repeat booking rate, churn rate, NPS; alert if trending down

integrations.fallback: Query cached session data; manually send reminders if API down
Queue emails in buffer; retry hourly
Escalate to finance for manual refund processing
Queue events locally; retry when available

functional: All reminders sent at correct times (within ±15 min tolerance)
Outcome forms submitted and stored correctly
Effectiveness scoring accurate (validated against manual review)
performance: Loyalty program enrollment rate > 50% (of repeat bookers)

error_handling.policy: Ensure reminder delivery, escalate failures, prevent double-sends

error_cases.handling: Queue in buffer, retry with exponential backoff
error_cases.escalation: If not delivered by session time, manual escalation

error_cases.handling: Return error to user, allow retry
error_cases.escalation: If form repeatedly fails, manual outcome capture by support

error_cases.error: No-show detected (session time passed, patient not in call)
error_cases.handling: Mark session as no-show, escalate to concierge
Flag immediately, don't process refund without review

startup_checklist: Perform dry-run of full session → outcome → follow-up cycle
